journeys.label: Onboarding (Golden Path)
journeys.description: EP-001 to EP-004, then TR-001A, Practice Builder, Publish, and Badge

journeys.label: Seeding Track
journeys.description: Standalone seed work: export an artifact and earn the seeding badge.

journeys.label: Division Track: AeroVista
journeys.description: Understand the divisions, open the offer system, ship a seed artifact.

journeys.label: The Art Localized — Training
journeys.description: Listen -> Slide -> Engage -> Proof Mission. Episodes 0-4 + launch readiness mission + final assessment. Badges: Listener, Foundation, Division Ally, Partner Ready, Amplifier, Certified.

journeys.label: Contributor Onboarding — Training
journeys.description: Listen → Slide → Engage. Episodes 0–4 + final assessment. Focus: studio context, fit, lanes, work orders, Crew Check readiness.

journeys.label: Apparel Ops Onboarding
journeys.description: AV Apparel ByteCasts + practice + work order + seed. Listen → Slide → Engage → Training → Seed → Badge.

steps.label: Real Work Order
steps.cta: Submit a real apparel change request

journeys.label: Lumina Revenue Lane
journeys.description: Learning lane: EP-LUM-101 to EP-LUM-106, then TR-LUM-001, SEED-LUM-001, and Badge. Golden Path is helpful, not required.

journeys.label: Shareholder Season 1 — Briefings
journeys.description: Optional linear briefing lane (S1-EP-01 through S1-EP-06). Not part of Golden Path onboarding.
